If the 4th or its lord be with an inimical planet, his belongings
like lands, cattle and vehicles would be usurped by his enemies.
The Fifth Bhdvav— If the 5th Bhava and its Amsa are owned
by benefics, or if its lord is posited in the Amsa and house of a
benefic, or if the lord of this Bhava is posited in the same
Bhava, or if the lord of the Bhava has attained a Vaisesikamsa
(This has been already explained. They are called Parijata,
Uttama, Gopura etc.) and is posited in an auspicious Bhava, the
subject will be intelligent and honest. Of course, the aspect
of benefics too will have good effects on the Bhava. These

108 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
fundamental principles will enable you to understand the
happiness, longevity, number etc. of children the subject is going
to beget. Please read the general principles enunciated in
connection with the 5th Bhava.
